sources.title: Diseases of the Sella Turcica and Parasellar Region - Diseases of the Brain, Head and Neck, Spine 2024-2027
sections_supported: fat-containing lesions and sellar/parasellar differential where relevant
sources.notes: Use only if lipoma location overlaps; deep review needs a dedicated intracranial lipoma source.

sources.title: Brain tumours (primary) and brain metastases in adults - NICE Guideline No. 99
sources.notes: Use for primary brain tumour and brain metastasis guideline framing. Search result states standard structural MRI includes T2, FLAIR, DWI, and pre/post-contrast T1 volume for suspected glioma.

sources.title: ACR Appropriateness Criteria: Brain Tumors
sources.notes: Use as broad neuro-oncologic imaging appropriateness source. Search result reports 2025 JACR guideline covering intra- and extra-axial tumors and progression workup.
